message: Jake
Yuriko
Kristy
You're late,
right? No way your secretary didn’t pass the message?
Sorry for being late. But I’ve been busy with a lot of things.
Yeah.
Right, I guess you put me on the back burner.
No, I’ve actually been worried about you since then.
Your words and attitude don’t match, do they?
Thanks for coming all this way.
What’s going on with you today?
Nothing like that.
I was just curious about how she’s doing, but it seems she’s out.

This room, coordinated by Laura and Ashley, hasn’t changed at all since my student days.
When I'm like this, I feel as if I'm slipping back into the past.
The room was faintly filled with the scent of Diorissimo. It’s my favorite fragrance, and it was me who recommended it to her.
Even while being in my own room, I act somewhat tense. I wonder if she's nervous around me?
Dressed in the same traditional style as when we were students.
It suits her much better than party clothes.
Maybe she looks a bit tired.
Please, bring back the relationship between me and Guy.
Please, hurry up and leave here. I don’t want more nasty rumors to spread. Don’t ruin my happiness, please.
I’m sorry, I’ll head back.
Be careful when you leave. Just don’t get photographed or anything.
Really, take care! Please.
I wonder if it’s really over with Guy.
We just got engaged, and yet no plans for the ceremony have even been settled.
I don't know what to do anymore.
I would have at least liked you to call me before coming.
I’m engaged to Guy. If you came to my house all alone, it would just become gossip fodder again.
Ah.
I never even thought of that.
Yeah, you’ve always been a bit forgetful like that. You seem cool, but you're actually kind of silly.
You’re the only one I can rely on.
Hey.
Please, I want you to help fix my broken relationship with Guy.
Please.
Please.
Help me.
It’s alright,
I’ll make sure you get a chance to talk to Guy.
Yeah, after that, it’s our problem to deal with.
Already.
I just don’t know what to do anymore.
Guy is avoiding me.
It’s just a temporary thing.
Hmm, that's not it. I can tell. You're serious about Cindy, aren't you?
No way, you're overthinking it.
Hmm, I’m sure I’m not overthinking it.
You don’t have to worry about me in a weird way.
You seemed down at the party, and I’ve been worried about what happened before.
So I came to check on you. By the way, did you hear from Guy?
Whether or not he contacted me, is that something you need to report to me?
No, that’s not it, but—
Then don’t be so nosy.
Guy and I are happy. So there’s nothing to worry about.
Yes, there’s nothing to worry about.
Someone help me.
The truth is, I'm suffering.
It feels like my chest is tight and it’s painful, and I can’t eat.
I just wanted to be happy.
So why has it come to this?
I’m fine. I’m really fine, truly.
Are you sure?
Oh, how rude. I'm always fine.
I hope so.
What are you trying to say?
Ahh, don’t talk about that anymore.
Let’s just talk calmly.
You know, Guy won’t even answer his phone. Even when I visit, he pretends not to be home.
Maybe he really wasn’t home?
No, he’s avoiding me. I can tell. He’s been like that since the party.
I found this article.
Look.
I handed over BAM.
She took it and eagerly read the problematic article.
What is this?
What is this article?
What on earth is going on here!?
Well, this is
This must be a rumor.
It's not a rumor.
It must be the truth.
I decided not to care about what that kind of gossip magazine says.
Are you trying to say I'm involved with that gossip?
Oh, was it different? You were all buddy-buddy with that detestable female reporter.
Sounds like jealousy.
Jealousy? Don't be ridiculous. I have a wonderful fiancé named Guy. What more could I want?
I know everything. You said something to Guy, didn't you? That's why that article was written.
I met Guy at the party after a long time.
The timing is just too perfect, don't you think? Are you holding some kind of key?
Did something happen with Eva Courtney?
Huh, what did you say?
I asked if you had anything to do with the person who wrote that article.
There's no way I'd have anything to do with someone like that. It was our first meeting.
I don't even want to hear that woman's name. I'm bothered by that kind of article.
That's true.
I hope another article like that is never written again.
That woman has given me misfortune.
Anyway, I need to meet Guy and hear him out.
Next time it’s about Cindy and true love.
I think this article is nonsense, but why does Guy remain silent?
What on earth is Guy doing?
Has he lost interest in me?
I don't recall Guy acting particularly strange.
I thought it was just a trivial fight at the party, but was it actually something deep-rooted?
Having taken it on, I want to do something about it.
As you said,
needed me.
To avoid the sight of parting with Guy,
is hiding something. That’s what I felt when I was taken to Baked Apple Inc..
The conflict with Guy and the articles, maybe everything stems from that hidden matter.
With a look of annoyance,
is accusing me with those green eyes. What on earth did I do?
Who spread the articles about Guy, and what was their intention?
I can't believe Eva just wrote them on her own.
From their side, it might be a rumor, but what about Guy?
I need to ask Guy.
I wonder why such an article came out.
It's a mystery.
I trust you.
I'm going to see Guy now.
Yeah.
Please.
ＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲ
Okay.
Oh,　Boss?
Yes.
What's wrong, is something up?
Um, I got a call from Director Fabar.
Please come to the filming location in Central Park urgently.
That’s what I was told.
Director　Fabar?
Got it, I'll go take a look.
Please!
Alright then,
So, where should I go, Guy and Director Fabar?
which way should I head?
